---
title: "Jacob Anderson"

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: broadside
  image: images/jacob.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/chejj/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-anderson-a33b551b0/
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I'm a Data Scientist based out of Utah. Whether it's NLP, Imaging, Signal Processing, Patient Data, Customer Data, Finance, etc.-- I've probably built and deployed a model for it. When I'm not delivering powerful insights to corporate overlords, you can find me at home trying (and failing) to learn a new recipe, or playing board games, but usually hanging out with my wife and our friends. Whenever possible, we love to travel.

## Experience

TD Williamson \| Data Scientist II \| June 2024 - Present

ASU \| Data Science / Statistics Course Assistant \| Aug 2025 - Present

Lumea \| Integrations Engineer / Manager \| Feb 2021 - June 2024

NuSkin \| Tech Support (Spanish) \| Nov 2017 - Jan 2021

## Education

Brigham Young University \| B.S. Applied Statistics

Arizona State University \| M.S. Biological Data Science
:::
